Every month I periodically see the recycled take that “something better than chat” is coming for AI. That chat is temporary.

In fact, I predict the opposite. More of our work and life will happen through chat and voice interfaces of increasingly intelligent agents. 🦞 OpenClaw

x.name: Zara Zhang
x.bio: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w Substack: https://t.co/dDPEWGiuBW

tweets.text:
If you wanna level up in AI, spend an hour every day on tinkering and playing with the models. Build something & have fun with it. Test the model’s limits. Don’t be utilitarian.

I guarantee that if you do this consistently for a month, at the end you’ll look back and realize

How I build skills:
1. Brute-force a task with Claude Code
2. Iterate until it meets my criteria
3. Get Claude to read this folder, where I pre-downloaded blogs & docs from Anthropic team, and turn what we just did into a skill
4. Eval the skill using skill-creator plugin https://t.co/VZDq6W4pj9 https://t.co/7QzH70Pmn3
